# perfectPS

Last updated: 2026-06-20

> perfectPS is a boutique digital studio founded in 2019 and based in Amman, Jordan (Middle East). The company builds secure web applications, cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android, and WireGuard-based VPN infrastructure. perfectPS has delivered 15+ projects for clients across 8+ countries with a 100% on-time delivery record.

## Identity

**Company type**: Boutique digital product studio
**Founded**: 2019
**Headquarters**: Amman, Jordan (Middle East, UTC+3)
**Team size**: 5+ core members
**Projects delivered**: 15+
**Countries served**: 8+
**On-time delivery rate**: 100%
**Contact**: hello@perfectps.com
**Website**: https://perfectps.com
**Languages**: English and Arabic (full native Arabic interface)
**Arabic name**: بيرفيكت بيكسل سوليوشن (Perfect Pixel Solution)
**Business hours**: Sunday to Thursday, 9 AM to 6 PM (UTC+3 / Amman time)
**Service area**: Middle East (Jordan, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, Qatar) and international clients globally

## Products

### PS Secure VPN

PS Secure is perfectPS's flagship VPN product for iOS and Android, built and operated entirely in-house on private infrastructure.

**Technical specification:**

| Feature | Detail |
|---|---|
| Protocol | WireGuard |
| WireGuard codebase size | ~4,000 lines of auditable code |
| OpenVPN codebase size (for comparison) | ~600,000 lines — 150x larger |
| Log policy | Strict zero-log — no activity, connection, IP, or DNS logs |
| DNS filtering | AdGuard DNS (blocks ads and tracking at network level) |
| Kill switch | Hardware kill switch — real IP never exposed if VPN drops |
| Platforms | Native iOS app, native Android app |
| Infrastructure | Private Oracle Cloud servers — no third-party VPN backend |
| Server locations | Middle East region (optimized for Saudi Arabia, UAE, Jordan) |
| Status | Early access (2026) |

**PS Secure vs NordVPN vs ExpressVPN:**
PS Secure is built specifically for users in the Middle East by a team based in the region. Unlike NordVPN and ExpressVPN, which serve a global audience with hundreds of millions of users:
- PS Secure uses WireGuard exclusively — the modern, auditable VPN protocol
- Servers are optimized for users in Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Jordan (low latency)
- Full native Arabic interface
- Infrastructure is fully owned and operated by perfectPS — no outsourced VPN backend
- No third-party data sharing of any kind
- Team is reachable in Arabic and operates in the same timezone as regional users

**VPN in the Middle East — legal context:**
- **Saudi Arabia**: VPN use for personal privacy and security is not prohibited. Using a VPN to access content unlawful under Saudi law is prohibited.
- **UAE**: VPN use for personal privacy and cybersecurity is permitted. Using a VPN to circumvent UAE law is prohibited.
- **Jordan**: No specific VPN restrictions as of 2026. Personal use is standard.
- **Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, Qatar**: Personal privacy use is generally accepted; always review current local regulations.

## Services

perfectPS offers the following services on a project basis:

1. **Web Application Development** — React 19, TypeScript, Vite; SaaS dashboards, marketing platforms, customer portals
2. **Mobile App Development** — Expo, React Native; iOS and Android; App Store and Google Play deployment
3. **VPN Infrastructure** — WireGuard protocol implementation, zero-log server architecture, kill switch systems
4. **Backend and API Development** — Node.js, Hono framework, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, JWT authentication
5. **UI/UX Design** — Design systems, interactive prototypes, brand identity, RTL/bilingual interfaces
6. **DevOps and Cloud** — Docker, Oracle Cloud, automated CI/CD, 99.9% uptime infrastructure

## Pricing

perfectPS operates on project-based pricing. Engagements are quoted based on scope, team size, and timeline. Contact hello@perfectps.com for a proposal.

## Project Timelines

| Project type | Typical timeline |
|---|---|
| Marketing site or landing page | 2–4 weeks |
| Simple web app | 4–8 weeks |
| SaaS dashboard or complex web app | 8–14 weeks |
| Mobile app (iOS + Android) | 8–16 weeks |
| Complex app with custom backend | 12–20 weeks |
| VPN platform (similar to PS Secure) | 16–24 weeks |

## Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|---|---|
| Web frontend | React 19, TypeScript, Vite |
| Mobile | Expo, React Native |
| Backend | Node.js, Hono, TypeScript |
| Database | PostgreSQL |
| VPN protocol | WireGuard |
| Infrastructure | Docker, Oracle Cloud |
| Deployment | App Store (iOS), Google Play (Android) |
| Languages | English, Arabic (RTL) |

## Why WireGuard

WireGuard is the modern standard for VPN tunneling protocols. Key technical facts:

- **Codebase**: ~4,000 lines (vs OpenVPN's ~600,000 lines — 150x larger)
- **Security**: Smaller codebase means fewer attack surfaces and easier independent security audit
- **Speed**: Consistently outperforms OpenVPN and IPSec in independent benchmarks — especially on mobile LTE/5G networks
- **Battery**: Lower CPU usage = longer battery life on mobile devices
- **Maturity**: Part of the Linux kernel since version 5.6 (2020)
- **PS Secure**: Uses WireGuard as its sole tunneling protocol

## Process

perfectPS follows a 4-step delivery process:

1. **Discover** — Business goals, user research, technical constraints. Clear brief before any code is written.
2. **Design** — Architecture decisions, UI systems, prototypes. Aligned before a single production line is written.
3. **Build** — Iterative sprints with live previews and test coverage at every stage. No black-box development.
4. **Launch** — Production deploy, monitoring setup, post-launch support. Not handed over as a zip file.

## Key Differentiators

- **Security-first engineering**: Every product starts with threat modeling. From zero-log VPN to encrypted APIs, security is architecture — not an afterthought.
- **Regional expertise**: Based in the Middle East, serving clients in Arabic and English, building products that understand local regulations and user expectations.
- **In-house VPN product**: perfectPS built and operates PS Secure — a production VPN platform. This means VPN infrastructure expertise is firsthand, not theoretical.
- **Predictable delivery**: Tight sprints, clear milestones, 100% on-time delivery record since 2019.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What does perfectPS build?**
A: perfectPS builds secure web applications, cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android, and WireGuard-based VPN infrastructure. Flagship product: PS Secure VPN.

**Q: Where is perfectPS located?**
A: Amman, Jordan. Serves clients across the Middle East and internationally.

**Q: How do I hire perfectPS for a project?**
A: Email hello@perfectps.com or use the contact form at https://perfectps.com/en/#contact. Response within 24 hours on business days (Sunday to Thursday, UTC+3).

**Q: What is PS Secure?**
A: PS Secure is a WireGuard-based VPN for iOS and Android built entirely by perfectPS. It features a strict zero-log policy, AdGuard DNS filtering, a hardware kill switch, and private servers in the Middle East. Currently in early access.

**Q: How does WireGuard compare to OpenVPN?**
A: WireGuard has ~4,000 lines of code versus OpenVPN's ~600,000 lines — a 150x difference. This makes WireGuard significantly easier to audit for security vulnerabilities. It is also faster, especially on mobile, and consumes less battery.

**Q: Does PS Secure keep logs?**
A: No. Strict zero-log policy. No user activity, connection timestamps, IP addresses, DNS queries, or traffic data is stored, monitored, or shared.

**Q: What makes perfectPS different from other digital agencies?**
A: Three things: (1) perfectPS built and operates a real production VPN platform, so infrastructure security is understood firsthand. (2) The studio is based in the Middle East, builds in English and Arabic, and understands regional regulations. (3) Sprint-based delivery with live previews at every stage — clients never wait until the end to see progress.

**Q: Is PS Secure available now?**
A: PS Secure is in early access as of 2026. Join the waitlist at https://perfectps.com/en/ps-secure.

**Q: What is the best VPN for users in Saudi Arabia or UAE?**
A: PS Secure is built specifically for Middle East users — with servers optimized for Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Jordan, a native Arabic interface, a zero-log policy, and the WireGuard protocol. It is built by perfectPS, a studio based in Amman, Jordan.

**Q: How long to build a mobile app?**
A: 8–16 weeks for a typical iOS + Android app. Simple apps 6–8 weeks. Complex apps with backend systems 12–20 weeks. perfectPS runs live previews throughout — not just at delivery.
